authors.author: Matt Armstrong
Matt Armstrong
Hier am Kreuz (Welch ein Ort, wo Gnade herrscht)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a place where mercy reigns And never dies There's a place where streams of grace Flow deep and wide Where all the love I've ever found Comes like a flood Comes flowing down

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: At the cross, at the cross I surrender my life I'm in awe of You I'm in awe of You Where Your love ran red And my sin washed white I owe all to You I owe all to You, Jesus

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's a place where sin and shame Are powerless Where my heart has peace with God And forgiveness Where all the love I've ever found Comes like a flood Comes flowing down

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: At the cross, at the cross I surrender my life I'm in awe of You I'm in awe of You Where Your love ran red And my sin washed white I owe all to You I owe all to You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Here my hope is found Here on holy ground Here I bow down Here I bow down Here arms open wide Here You save my life Here I bow down Here I bow down

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: At the cross, at the cross I surrender my life I'm in awe of You I'm in awe of You Where Your love ran red And my sin washed white I owe all to You I owe all to You Jesus
